content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with NIFTY +1%, BANKNIFTY +1%, REALTY +2.7%, METAL +1.4%, ENERGY +1.2%, AUTO +1.1%. VIX down 3% to 17.9 confirms risk-on. Only IT lagging. Book is well-positioned with 8 of 9 holdings green or near flat; priority is to lock in gains via SL trails on winners and prune binary-event exposure (BAJAJ-AUTO May 6 board, EXIDEIND today, GODREJPROP today, CESC May 6).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding +6.4%. Current SL 1040 sits ABOVE intraday low 1045.50 and very close to CMP 1047 — risk of self-stopout on noise. Loosening would be rejected, but actually 1040 > intraday low? No: low is 1045.50, SL 1040 is 5.50 below CMP — fine. Tightening to 1030 widens gap and protects ~4.7% profit while giving room for the 1033 S1 level to act as support. R:R remains favorable; thesis intact (Q4 beat, GNPA <1%, sector tailwind)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2% but holding above SL 119. Risk-on day pressuring gold but macro hedge thesis (Middle East, INR weakness) intact. SL 119 is ~3% below CMP — appropriate. No action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding +5% near 52w high (1851 vs CMP 1823). SL at 1810 is unchanged but target 1880 unlikely before May 19 binary Q4 print. Tightening target to 1850 (just below 52w high) to ensure exit on next push. Per binary-event discipline: Q4 May 19 is >3 sessions out so HOLD valid for now, but will revisit. SL 1810 is 0.7% below CMP — leaving as-is since this is a near-target lock-in trade. No-op SL? Stored is 1810, proposed 1810 — that part is no-op but target change makes the MODIFY meaningful."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.7%. SL 23.85 is just below CMP 24.12 (~1.1% gap) — adequate trail already in place. Pharma sector momentum intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 948.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.8% to 959.30 with strong intraday breakout (+3.15%). Trailing SL from 944 (entry/breakeven) to 948 — locks in small gain. Gap to CMP is 11.30 (~1.2%) — above 0.5% trail-gap floor. Target 990 unchanged (R:R 1:3.5 from new SL). Q4 beat confirmed, AUM Rs 5L cr milestone."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +2.8% to 1738, broke 52w high (1742 today vs prior 1672). Trailing SL from 1700 (entry) to 1715 — locks in small gain, gap to CMP is 23 (~1.3%). Target 1790 unchanged (R:R 1:3.3 from new SL). Strong momentum, dividend record date June 12."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.1%. Faded from 52w high 1600 to 1537 today — sharp intraday reversal. SL 1510 is 1.8% below CMP, appropriate. Q4 results May 8 (4 sessions away — outside 3-session binary-event window for now). Hold; will re-evaluate next tick on results proximity."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1% from entry. Faded from intraday high 13976 to 13684 — gave back gains but still above SL 13400 (2.1% buffer). Auto sector strong, record April wholesales. Hold; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 5,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY-EVENT DISCIPLINE: May 6 board meeting in 2 sessions — triple catalyst (Q4 results + buyback + dividend). Position is at -1% with sharp intraday reversal from 10477 high to 10205 (-2.6% off high) — shooting star pattern on daily. Per rule 11, default disposition for held position with binary catalyst within 3 sessions is EXIT or risk-trim. Position size ~₹51k (~5% of portfolio) is at the threshold; chose (a) full exit ahead of asymmetric event with stock already showing distribution. Better to redeploy and re-evaluate post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PLACEHOLDER REMOVED — see decisions array; no new ADANIPORTS BUY (already held, just trailed SL above)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in profit, SL widened from 1040 (close to CMP) to 1030 for breathing room above S1 1033."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge thesis intact, SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tightened target only; SL 1810 stays. May 19 binary outside 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 already trailed close; no change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 948.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from breakeven 944 to 948 to lock small gain after +3% intraday move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from entry 1700 to 1715 after 52w breakout. Adequate 1.3% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sharp fade off 52w high but holding entry. SL 1510 adequate. Q4 May 8 to monitor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Faded from intraday high but auto thesis intact. SL 13400 has 2.1% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Binary event (May 6 board: Q4 + buyback + dividend) within 2 sessions, shooting star daily, faded off intraday high. Asymmetric tail not worth holding through."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ANANTRAJ pending BUY @506 from 356m ago — let it sit; realty momentum strong today, no need to chase. RRKABEL strong breakout +4% 3x volume but already up 17% in 4 sessions post-Q4 — chasing here is poor R:R. FLUOROCHEM +12% with UBS Sell rating Rs 3000 target — avoid, governance/EV-ramp risk. CESC at 52w high but Q4 May 6 = binary, plus power-cluster discipline — pass. EXIDEIND, GODREJPROP results today — wait for post-event clarity before considering entry. SYNGENE, LALPATHLAB, BANDHANBNK, ASTERDM all near 52w highs — would need pullback for entry. BHEL, HAL: defence/capex theme strong but already extended. KOTAKBANK -5% post-Q4 dip is interesting but want to see base form.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 47%, cash 53% — comfortable buffer. Today's actions are RISK MANAGEMENT focused: (1) EXIT BAJAJ-AUTO ahead of May 6 triple-binary, (2) Trail SLs on 3 winners (PNBHOUSING, BAJFINANCE, ADANIPORTS), (3) HOLD on rest. Not adding new positions — the watchlist has many extended names (specialty chem +12%, breakouts already through 52w highs) and several binary-event candidates today/this week. Better setups will emerge post Q4 earnings cluster. Power cluster discipline still active (had TATAPOWER/POWERGRID/TORNTPOWER history) — avoiding CESC despite breakout. Existing book exposed across financial services (PNBHOUSING + BAJFINANCE = ~14%), pharma (SUNPHARMA + PHARMABEES = ~9%), auto (MARUTI = 5.5%, exiting BAJAJ-AUTO), services (ADANIPORTS + GESHIP = ~10%), gold (5%) — well diversified, no cluster overload."
}
